market_pulse: Las Vegas nightclub market shows moderate activity mid-week. Omnia Dayclub opening at Caesars May 15 with Fisher/Rüfüs Du Sol/Martin Garrix lineup signals major competitive investment from Tao Group. Palm Tree Beach Club (Wet Republic rebranded) driving dayclub momentum with luxury pool positioning. Zouk and other established venues maintaining baseline operations. No major talent surprise announcements detected in last 4 hours.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (Omnia, Encore, Tao Group venues) emphasizing international DJ lineups (Fisher, Rüfüs Du Sol, Martin Garrix for May 15 Omnia opening). LIV positioning unclear in recent data.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Secure and announce talent bookings for April/May weekends to match competitive positioning

content_gaps.description: Palm Tree Beach Club and Encore Beach Club leveraging 'luxury oasis' and high-engagement photo moments (#instastory trending). Daytime luxury brand identity strong at competitors.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Emphasize LIV Beach's luxury amenities, cabanas, exclusive photo moments in story content

content_gaps.description: Multiple competitors (OMNIA, Palm Tree, Tao Group) highlighting spring/summer seasonal transitions and renovations. 2026 season positioning active.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 'Spring 2026' campaign messaging for both LIV Nightclub and LIV Beach

notes.data_limitation: Brave web search returns general venue info and news articles, but does NOT index real-time Instagram Stories, TikTok feeds, or X (Twitter) timelines. For live social media monitoring, require: (1) Instagram Business API access, (2) TikTok data API, (3) X v2 API with search capability. Current run limited to public news coverage and indirect social references.
recommended_next_steps: Integrate native Instagram/TikTok/X API calls or use third-party monitoring service (e.g., Sprout Social, Buffer, Later, Brandwatch)
For 4-hourly runs: establish baseline follower counts and engagement rates via API, track minute-by-minute story activity
Archive baseline data for trend analysis (weekly/monthly comparisons)
